overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating a futuristic urban environment. The sequence begins in a sunlit plaza with monumental stairs, transitions through a dark covered walkway lined with neon advertisements, and ends at an elevated overlook with panoramic city views. The environment shifts between bright natural daylight and artificially lit enclosed spaces.

events.description: character begins ascending wide concrete stairs from plaza level
passes close to pedestrian in pink top descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up wide concrete stairs in a futuristic plaza, passing pedestrians and vending structures

notable_agents.action: standing near yellow public toilet booth looking at device
descending stairs wearing bright pink top and reflective blue pants

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit urban plaza with a massive concrete staircase dominating the center. The character ascends the stairs, passing a public toilet booth on the left and futuristic street furniture. Other pedestrians move in opposing directions, including a figure in bright pink descending the stairs. The megabuilding with red structural elements looms in the background against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway transitioning into covered structure

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead metal beam structure
ambient light decreases significantly as moving deeper into covered area

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway past a red vending kiosk, entering a shaded corridor with industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing blue jacket and shorts
sitting on ground near vending machines

entered.detail: bright red automated vendor booth with glass front and orange roof
large vertical screen displaying advertisement with face and BARGHEST text
industrial steel beam structure with grating overhead

segments.scene_description: The character moves along an elevated walkway, passing a prominent red vending kiosk and digital billboards. The environment transitions from open sky to a covered structure with industrial metal beams overhead. Lighting becomes mixed as natural sunlight filters through the structure, and the path leads toward a darker enclosed section ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertising

events.description: environment becomes fully artificially lit with neon advertisements illuminating the walls
character slows slightly while navigating past other pedestrians in narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through dimly lit enclosed corridor lined with glowing digital advertisements and neon signs

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing blue vest and brown pants
walking past camera in white shirt and dark pants

entered.detail: large illuminated vertical advertisement for Moxie beverage with purple branding
industrial steel barrier along the left edge of walkway
glowing neon restaurant sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a fully enclosed walkway where natural light disappears completely. The corridor is illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements including a large Moxie billboard and various digital screens. Metal railings line the path, and industrial pipes run along the ceiling. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with artificial lighting dominating the visual field.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approaching exit with increasing natural light

events.description: natural daylight becomes visible at end of corridor indicating approach to exit
emerging from covered walkway into open elevated overlook area

agents.ego_description: continuing through walkway toward bright exit, passing groups of pedestrians and large advertisements

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near wall
person in wheelchair being pushed by another pedestrian

entered.detail: large advertisement displaying UPGRADE NOW: V3.0 FREE text with orange background
stairs leading up toward bright daylight exit from covered area
pink neon sign for Watson Whore establishment

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the covered walkway where bright daylight begins to flood in. Large digital billboards line the walls including one advertising a V3.0 upgrade. The path leads up concrete stairs toward an exit, with a pink neon sign for Watson Whore visible. The environment transitions from artificial lighting back to natural sunlight as the character nears the open overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city overlook with panoramic urban views

events.description: full bright sunlight returns as character exits structure into open air

agents.ego_description: standing at elevated overlook admiring the futuristic cityscape with glass towers and transit structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking past overlook
person sitting on bench overlooking the city vista

entered.detail: panoramic view of futuristic city with dense cluster of glass skyscrapers
elevated highway or monorail track structure running above the street
reflective modern skyscrapers with glass facades in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into bright sunlight at an elevated overlook offering a sweeping view of the futuristic city. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance under a clear blue sky, while an elevated transit structure runs along the left side. The scene transitions from the enclosed artificial environment to an open, sunlit vista with pedestrians milling about the observation area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza through a dark, neon-lit corridor and back into a sunlit elevated vista. It begins with the character ascending a massive concrete staircase under a clear blue sky, passing pedestrians and futuristic street furniture beneath a looming megabuilding. As the character moves forward, the open air gives way to a covered walkway where natural light filters through industrial beams and red vending kiosks before fading entirely into a fully enclosed corridor. This artificial environment is dominated by vibrant neon advertisements and industrial piping, until the path leads up a final set of stairs where daylight begins to flood back in past digital billboards. The scene finally opens as the character emerges from the enclosure onto an elevated overlook, revealing a sweeping panoramic view of glass skyscrapers and transit structures under the bright sun.
